breaking.title: What India’s 12 ‘operationally deployed’ nuclear warheads really mean
breaking.summary: SIPRI’s latest assessment shows the maturation of India’s second-strike capability rather than a shift away from its long-standing ‘no first use’ doctrine; the development comes amid a broader global trend of nuclear modernisation and weakening arms-control frameworks

breaking.title: HDFC Bank shares in focus as lender appoints ex-finance secretary Rajiv Kumar as part-time chairman
breaking.summary: HDFC Bank has appointed former IAS officer and ex-Chief Election Commissioner Rajiv Kumar as its Part-time Chairman, following Atanu Chakraborty's abrupt resignation over ethical concerns. Kumar, known for his role in cleaning up public sector bank balance sheets, will serve a three-year term subject to RBI approval. The bank also announced Puneet Sharma as its new CFO. This news comes as HDFC Bank shares have seen mixed performance recently.

breaking.title: UP Ice Cream Seller Travels To Delhi To Kill Wife Over Suspicion Of Affair
breaking.summary: Police arrested a man for stabbing wife amid extramarital affair allegations.

breaking.summary: In the visuals obtained, thick plumes of black smoke billowed into the sky

breaking.title: Over 100 Venezuelans who were deported from U.S. hours before earthquakes are missing
breaking.summary: A deportation flight from Miami had 146 Venezuelans onboard, including 19 women and seven children, according to ICE Flight Monitor
